name: escalations
_note: repair.escalations reads the escalation inbox — the value/arc pathologies the repair cortex refused to auto-heal — from migration 029 initiatives, filtered to trigger_type='system_repair_escalation'. Against a live migrated DB it always returns ok:true with an escalations[] array (empty when nothing is queued), NEVER no_db. status defaults to 'pending' and may be overridden; results are newest-first (created_at DESC) capped at 100.
